name: Scottish Oat Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the shortening into the oatmeal, flour, baking soda, and salt until the mixture resembles fine crumbs.
2. Gradually add cold water, 1 tablespoon at a time, until the dough forms a stiff consistency.
3. Roll the dough on a lightly floured surface to about 1/8 inch thickness.
4. Cut into 2-inch rounds or squares.
5. Place the cut pieces on an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 375°F for 12 to 15 minutes, or until they just begin to brown.
